comp.notes: Posted band for remote Senior BI Analyst.

score.notes: Excellent fit: role wants dbt + semantic-layer self-serve BI, matching self-serve-dashboards and reporting-turnaround; cohort/retention work maps to churn-cohort-analysis and outreach-reallocation. Comp band ($75-95k) clears the $60k floor and meets the $78k target. Visa N/A — fully remote, no sponsorship needed. Remote-first global with EU/Africa overlap is ideal. Weighted: 0.40*9+0.20*8+0.15*10+0.15*10+0.10*8 = 9.0 -> 9.
